title: CC On & Off
description: Toggles Wi-Fi and Bluetooth On/Off explicitly from Control Center on iOS 11+.

changes.details: Fixed Bluetooth not turning off on iOS 15

title: Blurry Badges
description: Adds colored blur to SpringBoard icon badges.

title: NotTodayHomeScreenSideBar
description: Prevents Today View sidebar from being pinned on iPad homescreen. Widgets in Today View will still be accessible by swiping to the leftmost of the homescreen, just like how it is on iPad portrait or iPhone.

title: expandedclassicscreen
description: Uses a larger 414x736 (iPhone 6s+) resolution for classic apps on iPad.

title: Anywhere Widgets for iPad
description: Allows widgets to be on home screen on iPad.

changes.details: Removed icon grid size overrides, please use PadGrid to adjust this instead

title: AppPad
description: Full screen, Split and Slideover for every app on iPad.

changes.details: Fixed tweak not being injected into SpringBoard sometimes

title: PadGrid
description: Increases home screen icon grid size for iPad.

changes.details: Added Reduce edge insets option for iPadOS 15+
Made IconOrder an option for icon layout persistence library
Added folder rows and columns settings (iOS 14+, contributed by @UInt2048)
